name: Mid Tone Wood Table Lamp - Threshold™
description:
Accent your space in vintage style with the Mid-Tone Wood Table Lamp from Threshold™. This table lamp features a neutral-hue drum-shaped shade and a textured base for an elegant appeal you'll love adding to your sleeping area, entryway or any other space. Made of wood, this table lamp has a one-way on and off light setting and is easy to operate with the base turn knob rotary switch.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
